notes: US standards coordinating body. Doesn't usually author standards itself — instead approves and distributes standards developed by accredited US technical committees (e.g., ANSI/ISO/IEC editions). Also distributes US adoptions of ISO/IEC. Paywalled at webstore.ansi.org.

data.notes: US-distributed editions of ISO/IEC standards. Technical content matches the ISO master; refer to secid:control/iso.org/<n> for the canonical record.

examples.note: Resolves the US-distributed ANSI edition; cross-reference secid:control/iso.org/27001.
